metadata.statute: Neb. Rev. Stat. §45-104 (12% liquidated); §45-103.02(1) (unliquidated, judgment rate)

annual_rate.notes: Nebraska prejudgment interest is 12% for LIQUIDATED claims (Neb. Rev. Stat. §45-104). UNLIQUIDATED claims (tort/personal injury) instead accrue prejudgment interest at the §45-103 variable judgment rate — currently 5.970% (in effect since July 16, 2026) — under §45-103.02(1), not 12%. Verify at nebraskajudicial.gov. Not legal advice.
